description: Dual-basket hedging strategy with rotational profit-taking and averaging-down.

base_units.title: Base Units
base_units.description: Base lot size in currency units (e.g. 1000 = 1 lot).

m_pips.title: Trend Take-Profit (pips)
m_pips.description: Profit target for the trend-side rotational take-profit.

trend_lot_size.title: Trend Lot Size
trend_lot_size.description: Lot count for each trend-side entry and re-entry. Multiplied by Base Units to get currency units.

r_max.title: Max Steps (r_max)
r_max.description: Maximum number of counter-trend steps per cycle (including the initial entry).

f_max.title: Max Cycle Retries (f_max)
f_max.description: How many times the counter-trend cycle can restart after reaching r_max.

post_r_max_base_factor.title: Post r_max Base Factor
post_r_max_base_factor.description: Multiplier applied to base_units when a new cycle starts after r_max.

interval_mode.title: Interval Mode
interval_mode.description: How counter-trend add intervals are calculated. Manual mode allows per-step custom values.

n_pips_head.title: Interval Head (pips)
n_pips_head.description: Starting pip interval for counter-trend adds.

n_pips_tail.title: Interval Tail (pips)
n_pips_tail.description: Ending pip interval for counter-trend adds (after decay).

n_pips_flat_steps.title: Flat Steps
n_pips_flat_steps.description: Number of initial steps that use the head interval before decay begins.

n_pips_gamma.title: Interval Gamma
n_pips_gamma.description: Decay curve coefficient. >1 = slow start, <1 = fast start.

manual_intervals.title: Manual Intervals (pips)
manual_intervals.description: Per-step pip intervals when interval_mode is 'manual'. One value per add step (r_max − 1 entries).

counter_tp_mode.title: Close Price Mode
counter_tp_mode.description: How the close price for each counter-trend step is calculated.

counter_tp_pips.title: Take-Profit (pips)
counter_tp_pips.description: Fixed pip offset from entry price (fixed mode) or base value for progression modes.

counter_tp_step_amount.title: Step Amount (pips)
counter_tp_step_amount.description: Pips added or subtracted per step. Step 1 = base, Step 2 = base ± amount, Step 3 = base ± 2×amount, etc.

counter_tp_multiplier.title: Step Multiplier
counter_tp_multiplier.description: Multiplier per step. Step 1 = base, Step 2 = base × multiplier, Step 3 = base × multiplier², etc.

round_step_pips.title: Round Step (pips)
round_step_pips.description: Rounding unit for interval and TP calculations.

dynamic_tp_enabled.title: Dynamic Take-Profit (ATR)
dynamic_tp_enabled.description: Automatically adjust trend take-profit based on ATR volatility.

atr_period.title: ATR Period
atr_period.description: Number of candles for ATR calculation.

atr_baseline_lookback.title: ATR Baseline Lookback
atr_baseline_lookback.description: Number of candles for baseline ATR calculation.

m_pips_min.title: Dynamic m_pips Min
m_pips_min.description: Lower bound for ATR-adjusted trend take-profit.

m_pips_max.title: Dynamic m_pips Max
m_pips_max.description: Upper bound for ATR-adjusted trend take-profit.

margin_protection_enabled.title: Margin Protection
margin_protection_enabled.description: Enable multi-level margin protection (rebalance, shrink, lock, emergency stop).

m_th.title: Margin Level 1 - Shrink (%)
m_th.description: Margin ratio threshold to enter shrink mode (stop new entries, partial close).

n_th.title: Margin Level 2 - Lock (%)
n_th.description: Margin ratio threshold to enter lock mode (add net-zero hedge).

spread_guard_pips.title: Spread Guard (pips)
spread_guard_pips.description: Maximum spread allowed for new entries and lock release.

cooldown_sec.title: Cooldown (seconds)
cooldown_sec.description: Waiting period after lock release before resuming normal trading.

rebalance_start_ratio.title: Rebalance Start (%)
rebalance_start_ratio.description: Margin ratio at which BUY/SELL rebalancing begins.

rebalance_end_ratio.title: Rebalance End (%)
rebalance_end_ratio.description: Margin ratio target at which rebalancing stops.
